component.name: MessageSender_cancel
component.description: Cancels the enqueuing of a scheduled message, if they are not already enqueued. ```ballerina check sender->cancel(1); ```

component.name: MessageSender_sendPayload
component.description: Send message to queue or topic with a message body. ```ballerina check sender->sendPayload("Sample text message"); ```

component.name: MessageSender_schedule
MessageSender_sendBatch
MessageSender_send
component.description: Send message to queue or topic with a message body. ```ballerina check sender->send({body: "Sample text message", contentType: asb:TEXT}); ```

component.name: MessageSender_close
component.description: Closes the ASB sender connection. ```ballerina check sender->close(); ```
